questions.q: The present Constitution of the Philippines was ratified in what year?
questions.explanation: The 1987 Constitution was ratified in the February 2, 1987 plebiscite.

options: Code of Conduct and Ethical Standards for Public Officials and Employees
questions.explanation: RA 6713 (1989) sets the code of conduct and ethical standards for public officials and employees.

questions.q: How many members compose the Philippine Senate?
questions.explanation: The Constitution provides for 24 senators elected at large.

questions.q: The term of office of the President of the Philippines is:
questions.explanation: Art. VII: the President serves six years and is not eligible for any reelection.

questions.q: Which branch of government has the power to interpret laws?
questions.explanation: Judicial power is vested in the Supreme Court and lower courts.

questions.q: Under RA 6713, public officials must file a sworn statement of their assets and liabilities known as the:
questions.explanation: The Statement of Assets, Liabilities and Net Worth (SALN) is required by RA 6713.

questions.q: The constitutional body in charge of civil service examinations is the:
questions.explanation: The CSC is the central personnel agency of the government.

questions.q: Members of the House of Representatives serve a term of:
questions.explanation: Art. VI: representatives serve three-year terms, up to three consecutive terms.

questions.q: Which principle is stated in Art. II of the Constitution: "The Philippines is a ____ and republican State"?
questions.explanation: Art. II, Sec. 1: "The Philippines is a democratic and republican State."

questions.q: Under RA 6713, public servants must process papers and respond to letters within how many working days?
questions.explanation: RA 6713 Sec. 5(a) requires a reply to letters/requests within fifteen (15) working days.
